Type: This entity is designed to store basic information about the company/association that will use the system, thus providing initial data for the frontend to process.
The organization entity is the primary entity within the system; all other entities connect to it directly or indirectly.
_id (Primary), organization-public-id_1 (Unique), slug_1 (Unique), organization-email_1 (Unique, sparse), organization-name_text (Text search)
